sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_log10_addition (id UInt32, value Float64, value2 Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_log10_addition (id, value, value2) VALUES (1, 10.0, 20.0), (2, 0.0, 0.0), (3, NULL, 30.0);
SELECT id, log10(value + value2) AS log_value FROM test_log10_addition WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, log10(value + value2) AS log_sum_value FROM test_log10_addition WHERE value2 + 5 > 10;
SELECT id, log10(value + value2) AS log_combined_value FROM test_log10_addition GROUP BY id HAVING log_combined_value IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT avg(value) AS avg_value FROM test_log10_addition) AS subquery SELECT id, log10(subquery.avg_value + value) AS log_value FROM test_log10_addition JOIN subquery ON test_log10_addition.id = 1;
SELECT id, log10(value + (SELECT max(value2) FROM test_log10_addition WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL)) AS log_value FROM test_log10_addition;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, log10(value) AS log_value FROM test_log10_addition WHERE value > 0;
SELECT temp_table.id, temp_table.log_value + (SELECT count(*) FROM test_log10_addition) AS modified_log_value FROM temp_table;
SELECT id, log10(value + 1.0e-10) AS log_edge_case FROM test_log10_addition WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
